name: Red Back Mining Inc.
description: Red Back Mining Inc. was a prominent Africa-focused gold mining company specializing in the exploration, development, and operation of mineral deposits. As an unhedged gold producer, the company owned and operated key assets including the Chirano Gold Mine in Ghana and the Tasiast Gold Mine in Mauritania. The company was publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol RBI until it was acquired by Kinross Gold Corporation in 2010, a strategic merger that significantly expanded Kinross's portfolio of high-growth gold production assets in West Africa.
